Endurance of the Scout.lore: Capable of long patrols across Evendim and the North Downs.

Endurance of the Ranger-Scout.lore: Trusted to scout ahead of small ranger bands.

Endurance of the Far-Ranger.lore: Able to travel between Arnorian ruins without rest.

Stride of the North.lore: Your pace matches the seasoned rangers of the Weather Hills.

Stride of Eriador.lore: You can cross Eriador’s leagues with the endurance of old Arnor.

Wind of the North.lore: Your stride is light, reminiscent of Elven travelers.

Stride of Kings.lore: You bear the endurance of the Númenórean captains of old.

Scout of the North Downs.lore: Adept at rolling hills and low ridges.

Hill-man of Emyn Uial.lore: Skilled in the broken hills near Lake Evendim.

Watcher of the Weather Hills.lore: Trusted to guard the ancient watch-towers.

Guardian of Angmar’s Marches.lore: Capable of navigating the harsh northern wastes.

Master of the Misty Mountains.lore: You move through high passes with Elven surety.

Strength of the Blue Mountains.lore: Endurance of the hardy folk near Ered Luin.

Vigor of Annúminas.lore: The vitality of ancient Arnorian captains.

Might of Moria.lore: Strength to endure deep and dark trials.

Heart of Númenor.lore: The unbroken will of the Faithful.

Will of the White Tree.lore: A spirit worthy of Gondor’s kings.

Warden of the North Downs.lore: Keeps watch over the northern approaches.

Explorer of Old Fornost.lore: Trusted to map the ruins of the lost capital.

Explorer of Angmar.lore: Capable of long journeys into perilous lands.

Trailblazer of the North.lore: Opens new paths for the Grey Company.

Ranger of the Great East Road.lore: Travels the vast leagues between Bree and Rivendell.

Breath of Elendil.lore: The vigor of the first High King.

Roar of Rauros.lore: Power like the great falls of the Anduin.

Breath of the West Wind.lore: Lightness gifted by the winds of the West.

Wind of Gwaihir.lore: Swiftness akin to the Lord of the Eagles.

Wind of Thorondor.lore: Echoes of the mightiest eagle of the First Age.

Gift of Manwë.lore: A rare blessing of the Elder King’s breath.
